'''Boofer''' was a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying at the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Boofer was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Boofer remained at the Temple and participated in the [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]]. Administrated by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Ilena Xan]], Boofer faced off against fellow Initiate [[Horororibb]] in the tournament's first round.<ref name="YDR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Boofer first appeared in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'',<ref name="YDR" /> a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published on [[November 23]], [[2004]].<ref name="YDR Penguin">{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/173523/yoda-dark-rendezvous-star-wars-legends-by-sean-stewart/9780345463098|text=Yoda: Dark Rendezvous: Star Wars Legends}}</ref>
